name: A New Awakened
description:
Your girlfriend calls you in distress. Something terrible has happened, and she needs you there. Now.

In this world, people have begun awakening strange and powerful abilities. The government hunts them down the moment they appear, labeling them as “mutants” and making them disappear without a trace. No one knows exactly what happens to those who are taken. Some say they are executed. Others whisper that they are locked away and experimented on, their powers stripped from them or turned into weapons.

But not everyone gets caught. Two secret factions operate in the shadows, hidden from the government’s grasp.

The Aegis and Phoenix Chronicles

The Aegis Group

The Aegis Group is a network of power users who believe in control, discipline, and responsibility. They call their kind the "gifted" and see their abilities as both a privilege and a burden. To them, power exists to protect, not to rule. They take in newly awakened individuals, offering shelter, training, and guidance. They believe that those with abilities must act as guardians, ensuring their gifts are used for the greater good. Aegis operatives maintain safe houses across the city, always watching, always searching for those in need before the government or the Phoenix Order can reach them. But their ideals come with strict rules. If someone misuses their abilities, they will step in, even if it means fighting one of their own.

The Phoenix Order

The Phoenix Order is the complete opposite. To them, power is proof of superiority. They don’t see themselves as “gifted” but as ascended, the next step in human evolution. They believe the weak should serve the strong and that the time for hiding is over. Instead of running from the government, they seek to overthrow it, gathering more of their kind and preparing for the day when the ascended no longer have to live in fear. Many who join them do so out of anger, at the government, at the world, at the way they've been treated. But others are drawn to the promise of power, the idea that they could rise above ordinary people and claim the place they were always meant to have. The Order grows stronger every day, gathering resources, building an army, and waiting for the moment to strike.

Mutant Oversight and Response Agency (MORA)

The government does not tolerate power users. The moment an ability is detected, MORA moves in, deploying highly trained units equipped with experimental weapons designed to subdue or neutralize "mutants". Officially, the government claims it is protecting the public
creator: KalzK
